trust.description: We build long-term client relationships rooted in accuracy, integrity, and a deep understanding of your business.

services.description: Bookkeeping, tax consulting, and Virtual CFO — transparent processes tailored to your business.

expertise.title: Experience and expertise
expertise.description: Our team delivers evidence-based advice and analysis so you can make confident business decisions.

whyChoose.title: Your partner in growth — from the first invoice to group consolidation
whyChoose.description: Start HN in Sarajevo supports associations, sole traders, and micro, small, and medium businesses. Our work is grounded in being up-to-date, precise, and fully committed to our clients — we don't chase deadlines, we stay ahead of them.
whyChoose.body: We track regulatory changes and champion the digitalization of accounting — whether that means deploying internal systems with real-time visibility or handling documents delivered physically or by email. For clients who want deeper support, we offer a Virtual CFO service.

stats.title: Your business deserves accounting that thinks ahead, reacts on time, and stands behind its numbers.

items.quote: As a tech company we live and die by precision — Start HN gives us exactly that. No delays, no surprises, and always a step ahead of regulations.
items.author: Hamza Abdagić

items.quote: The professionalism and dedication of the Start HN team exceeded our expectations. The books are always accurate and on time, and the advice is practical.
items.author: Nedim Kulašin

items.quote: We moved to Start HN after frustration with our previous bookkeeper. The difference was clear from the first month — communication, accuracy, and proactive advice.
items.author: Amra Begić

items.quote: The Virtual CFO service changed how we run our business. We finally have a real picture of where our money goes and where we can grow.
items.author: Mirza Hadžić

credibility.subtitle: Why Choose Us
credibility.title: Experience, Not <gradient>Promises</gradient>
credibility.description: Based in Sarajevo at CRP Inkubator. Certified accountants delivering accuracy, integrity, and results for businesses of every size.

atlascopco.label: Certified & Regulated
atlascopco.outcome: All our accountants hold recognised professional certifications and operate under the oversight of regulatory bodies in Bosnia and Herzegovina, ensuring full legal compliance.

orange.label: Tax Compliance Record
orange.outcome: Our clients maintain a 100% on-time tax filing record. We track regulatory changes proactively so you never face penalties for late or incorrect submissions.

telecom.label: SME & Startup Specialists
telecom.outcome: Extensive experience supporting small and medium enterprises from founding through growth — handling registration, first accounts, and evolving compliance needs.

iot.label: Virtual CFO Results
iot.outcome: Businesses supported by our Virtual CFO service consistently improve cash flow visibility, reduce unnecessary costs, and achieve more confident financial planning.

drone.label: Accurate Reporting, Every Time
drone.outcome: We maintain rigorous quality control across all financial reports, ensuring statements are accurate, complete, and delivered on schedule — every reporting period.

payment.label: Payroll & Labour Law
payment.outcome: Full payroll processing in compliance with BiH labour law, including salary calculations, contributions, and employee documentation — zero errors, on time.

game.label: Education & Empowerment
game.outcome: Our training programmes have upskilled dozens of business owners and finance staff, improving in-house financial literacy and reducing costly bookkeeping mistakes.

social.label: Sarajevo Community Partner
social.outcome: Headquartered at CRP Inkubator, we are an active part of Sarajevo's entrepreneurial ecosystem — supporting local founders from day one.

iga.label: Multi-Entity & Group Accounting
iga.outcome: We handle complex multi-entity structures and group consolidations for larger businesses, providing a unified picture of financial performance across the whole group.

euAdjacent.title: Local Expertise, EU Awareness
euAdjacent.description: Deep knowledge of BiH tax and accounting law, combined with awareness of EU regulatory trends that affect local businesses.

yourEngineers.title: Your Accountants, Not a Call Centre
yourEngineers.description: A dedicated team that knows your business inside out. Direct contact with the accountant handling your books — no intermediaries.

hardwareToCloud.description: From registering your first company and opening books to managing the finances of a growing multi-entity business. We grow with you.

faq.subtitle: Common Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked <gradient>Questions</gradient>
faq.description: Everything you need to know about working with Start HN

scope.question: How do I start working with you?
scope.answer: Getting started is simple. Contact us for a free initial consultation — we'll learn about your business, current accounting setup, and what you need. From there we'll propose the right service package, agree on handover of any existing records, and have you fully onboarded within days. There's no long-term lock-in; we work to earn your confidence every month.

stack.question: What types of businesses do you serve?
stack.answer: We work with businesses of all sizes — from sole traders and newly registered startups through to established SMEs and multi-entity groups. We have particular expertise in retail, hospitality, professional services, construction, and e-commerce, but our team handles diverse industries across Bosnia and Herzegovina.

enterprise.question: Do you handle tax filing and compliance?
enterprise.answer: Yes, fully. We manage all aspects of your tax obligations: preparation and submission of VAT returns, corporate income tax, personal income tax, and all other statutory filings required under BiH and Federation law. We also monitor regulatory changes proactively and advise you whenever a change affects your business — so you're never caught off guard.

support.question: Can you serve as our Virtual CFO?
support.answer: Absolutely. Our Virtual CFO service gives you access to senior financial expertise without the cost of a full-time hire. We provide cash flow forecasting, budget planning, financial analysis, board-ready reports, and strategic advice — attending meetings as needed. It's ideal for growing businesses that need financial leadership but aren't yet ready for a dedicated CFO.

integration.question: What accounting software do you use?
integration.answer: We work with the leading accounting platforms used in BiH and internationally, including Pantheon, QuickBooks, and Xero, as well as local compliance tools for statutory reporting. If your business already uses a specific platform, we can typically work within it. We also advise on software selection if you're setting up for the first time or looking to upgrade.

industries.question: How are your services priced?
industries.answer: Our pricing is transparent and based on the scope and complexity of your needs. Most clients are on a fixed monthly retainer — you know exactly what you'll pay each month. We offer packages for bookkeeping-only, full accounting, tax compliance add-ons, and Virtual CFO services. We'll provide a clear quote after the initial consultation, with no hidden fees.

engagement.question: Do you offer education or training for businesses?
engagement.answer: Yes. We run regular workshops and courses covering accounting basics for entrepreneurs, tax obligations for small businesses, payroll and labour law, and financial statement interpretation. These are available both as group sessions and as tailored one-on-one training for your team. Contact us for the current schedule or to arrange a bespoke session.

faq.ctaDescription: Ready to get your finances in order? Let's talk about what you need.
